# hummbl-governance — llms.txt
# AI-readable index of the HUMMBL governance library.
# 25 governance primitives, 7 MCP servers, 1031 tests. Last updated: 2026-06-14.
#
# Query API: LLMs can parse this file to understand governance capabilities
# Installation: pip install hummbl-governance
# Documentation: https://github.com/hummbl-dev/hummbl-governance
#
# Compliance mappings:
#   NIST AI RMF: GOVERN MAP MEASURE MANAGE
#   ISO 42001: Clauses 4-10
#   SOC 2: CC1-CC9
#   EU AI Act: Articles 9-15 (high-risk systems)
#
# HUMMBL governance categories:
#   HUMMBL:SA  Safety primitives (kill switch, circuit breaker, output validator)
#   HUMMBL:CO  Cost governance (budget enforcement, spend tracking)
#   HUMMBL:ID  Identity & delegation (agent registry, delegation tokens)
#   HUMMBL:AUDIT Audit logging (append-only governance bus, evidence trails)
#   HUMMBL:COMP Compliance mapping (NIST, ISO, SOC 2, EU AI Act)
#   HUMMBL:RE  Reasoning & contracts (reasoning engine, schema validation)
#   HUMMBL:COORD Coordination (bus protocol, lamport clocks, convergence)
#   HUMMBL:HEALTH Health monitoring (probes, lifecycle, behavior monitoring)
#   HUMMBL:PHYS Physical AI safety (kinematic governor, pHRI safety)
#   HUMMBL:EAL  Execution assurance levels (EAL1-EAL4)

## Governance Primitives (25 total)

### Safety Primitives (4)

- **KillSwitch** (`hummbl_governance.kill_switch`)
  Emergency shutdown with 4 modes: DISENGAGED, HALT_NONCRITICAL, HALT_ALL, EMERGENCY
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

- **CircuitBreaker** (`hummbl_governance.circuit_breaker`)
  Resilience primitive with 3 states: CLOSED, HALF_OPEN, OPEN. Failure counting, timeout, backoff.
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COORD [NIST:MANAGE]

- **OutputValidator** (`hummbl_governance.output_validator`)
  Schema-based output validation with rejection policies
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:RE [NIST:MEASURE]

- **CapabilityFence** (`hummbl_governance.capability_fence`)
  Sandbox capability restriction (file access, network, subprocess)
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

### Cost & Budget (1)

- **CostGovernor** (`hummbl_governance.cost_governor`)
  Per-agent budget enforcement, spend tracking, alert thresholds, rate limiting
  Keywords: HUMMBL:CO HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

### Identity & Auth (2)

- **AgentRegistry** (`hummbl_governance.identity`)
  Agent identity management, registration, metadata, trust scoring
  Keywords: HUMMBL:ID HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN]

- **DelegationTokenManager** (`hummbl_governance.delegation`)
  HMAC-SHA256 delegation tokens with chain-depth enforcement, expiration, revocation
  Keywords: HUMMBL:ID HUMMBL:SA [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

### Audit & Compliance (3)

- **AuditLog** (`hummbl_governance.audit_log`)
  Append-only JSONL governance bus with message types: PROPOSAL, ACK, STATUS, BLOCKED, DECISION
  Keywords: HUMMBL:AUDIT HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

- **ComplianceMapper** (`hummbl_governance.compliance_mapper`)
  Maps controls to NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, SOC 2, EU AI Act with gap analysis
  Keywords: HUMMBL:COMP HUMMBL:AUDIT [NIST:GOVERN MAP MEASURE]

- **STRIDEMapper** (`hummbl_governance.stride_mapper`)
  STRIDE threat modeling with mitigation mapping to controls
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:MAP MANAGE]

### Reasoning & Contracts (3)

- **ReasoningEngine** (`hummbl_governance.reasoning`)
  Chain-of-thought reasoning with step-by-step validation, confidence scoring
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:COORD [NIST:MEASURE]

- **SchemaValidator** (`hummbl_governance.schema_validator`)
  JSON schema validation with custom rules, ValidationError export
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:SA [NIST:MEASURE]

- **ContractNetManager** (`hummbl_governance.contract_net`)
  Contract Net Protocol for multi-agent task allocation, bidding, awarding
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:COORD [NIST:MANAGE]

### Coordination (3)

- **CoordinationBus** (`hummbl_governance.coordination_bus`)
  TSV bus protocol with timestamp, from, to, type, message fields
  Keywords: HUMMBL:COORD HUMMBL:AUDIT [NIST:GOVERN]

- **LamportClock** (`hummbl_governance.lamport_clock`)
  Logical timestamps for distributed event ordering
  Keywords: HUMMBL:COORD HUMMBL:RE [NIST:MANAGE]

- **ConvergenceGuard** (`hummbl_governance.convergence_guard`)
  Detects non-convergent multi-agent states, triggers rollback
  Keywords: HUMMBL:COORD HUMMBL:SA [NIST:MANAGE]

### Behavior & Health (3)

- **RewardMonitor** (`hummbl_governance.reward_monitor`)
  Tracks reward signals, detects reward hacking, drift, specification gaming
  Keywords: HUMMBL:HEALTH HUMMBL:SA [NIST:MEASURE]

- **HealthProbe** (`hummbl_governance.health_probe`)
  HTTP health checks with latency measurement, status codes, uptime tracking
  Keywords: HUMMBL:HEALTH HUMMBL:COORD [NIST:MEASURE]

- **GovernanceLifecycle** (`hummbl_governance.lifecycle`)
  Agent lifecycle management (startup, shutdown, restart, phase transitions)
  Keywords: HUMMBL:HEALTH HUMMBL:COORD [NIST:MANAGE]

### Physical AI (1)

- **PhysicalGovernor** (`hummbl_governance.physical_governor`)
  Kinematic safety limits, pHRI (physical human-robot interaction) monitoring, emergency stop
  Keywords: HUMMBL:PHYS HUMMBL:SA [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

### Execution Assurance (1)

- **EAL** (`hummbl_governance.eal`)
  Execution Assurance Levels (EAL1-EAL4) with validation gates, rollback triggers
  Keywords: HUMMBL:EAL HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN MANAGE]

### Error Taxonomy (3)

- **GovernanceError** (`hummbl_governance.errors`)
  Base error class with governance context, severity, remediation
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:MANAGE]

- **FailureModes** (`hummbl_governance.failure_modes`)
  Classified failure modes (safety, cost, identity, compliance) with detection rules
  Keywords: HUMMBL:SA HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:MAP MEASURE]

- **EvolutionLineage** (`hummbl_governance.evolution_lineage`)
  Tracks agent evolution, version history, breaking changes, migration paths
  Keywords: HUMMBL:RE HUMMBL:COMP [NIST:GOVERN]

## MCP Servers (7 total)

### Core MCP Server (`mcp_server.py`)
- 10 tools: KillSwitch, CircuitBreaker, CostGovernor, AuditLog, ComplianceMapper, HealthProbe, SchemaValidator, OutputValidator, CapabilityFence, STRIDEMapper
- Entry point: `hummbl-governance-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_server`

### Compliance MCP Server (`mcp_compliance.py`)
- 5 tools: NIST AI RMF mapper, SOC 2 mapper, ISO 42001 crosswalk, STRIDE mapper, evidence export
- Entry point: `hummbl-compliance-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_compliance`

### Sandbox MCP Server (`mcp_sandbox.py`)
- 5 tools: CapabilityFence, OutputValidator, file access control, network control, subprocess control
- Entry point: `hummbl-sandbox-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_sandbox`

### Identity MCP Server (`mcp_identity.py`)
- 10 tools: AgentRegistry, DelegationTokenManager, LamportClock, identity query, token validation, chain verification
- Entry point: `hummbl-identity-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_identity`

### Agent Monitor MCP Server (`mcp_agent_monitor.py`)
- 11 tools: BehaviorMonitor, ConvergenceDetector, GovernanceLifecycle, EvolutionLineage, health checks, drift detection
- Entry point: `hummbl-agent-monitor-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_agent_monitor`

### Reasoning MCP Server (`mcp_reasoning.py`)
- Tools: ReasoningEngine, SchemaValidator, ContractNetManager, confidence scoring, step validation
- Entry point: `hummbl-reasoning-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_reasoning`

### Physical AI MCP Server (`mcp_physical.py`)
- 6 tools: KinematicGovernor, pHRISafetyMonitor, emergency stop, kinematic limits, collision detection, safety zone enforcement
- Entry point: `hummbl-physical-mcp` or `python -m hummbl_governance.mcp_physical`

## Quick Start Examples

### Kill Switch
```python
from hummbl_governance import KillSwitch, KillSwitchMode
ks = KillSwitch()
ks.engage(KillSwitchMode.HALT_NONCRITICAL, reason='Demo', triggered_by='user')
print(ks.check_task_allowed('critical_task'))  # True
print(ks.check_task_allowed('non_critical_task'))  # False
```

### Circuit Breaker
```python
from hummbl_governance import CircuitBreaker, CircuitMode
cb = CircuitBreaker(failure_threshold=5, timeout_seconds=60)
result = cb.call(risky_function)
if cb.mode == CircuitMode.OPEN:
    print("Circuit breaker is open, blocking calls")
```

### Cost Governor
```python
from hummbl_governance import CostGovernor
gov = CostGovernor(budget_usd=100.0, alert_threshold=0.8)
gov.record_spend(agent_id='claude-code', amount_usd=0.50)
if gov.check_budget_exceeded():
    print("Budget exceeded, blocking spend")
```

### Audit Log
```python
from hummbl_governance import AuditLog
log = AuditLog(path='governance_bus.tsv')
log.append(from_='agent', to='system', type='DECISION', message='Approved task')
```

## Compliance Framework Mapping

### NIST AI RMF Functions
- **GOVERN**: KillSwitch, CostGovernor, AgentRegistry, DelegationTokenManager, AuditLog, EAL
- **MAP**: STRIDEMapper, ComplianceMapper, FailureModes
- **MEASURE**: OutputValidator, RewardMonitor, HealthProbe, ReasoningEngine
- **MANAGE**: CircuitBreaker, ConvergenceGuard, GovernanceLifecycle, PhysicalGovernor

### ISO 42001 Clauses
- **Clause 4 (Context)**: AgentRegistry, EvolutionLineage
- **Clause 5 (Leadership)**: AuditLog, ComplianceMapper
- **Clause 6 (Planning)**: CostGovernor, EAL
- **Clause 7 (Support)**: HealthProbe, GovernanceLifecycle
- **Clause 8 (Operation)**: KillSwitch, CircuitBreaker, OutputValidator
- **Clause 9 (Performance)**: RewardMonitor, ConvergenceGuard
- **Clause 10 (Improvement)**: FailureModes, EvolutionLineage

### SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria
- **CC1 (Security)**: KillSwitch, DelegationTokenManager, CapabilityFence
- **CC2 (Availability)**: CircuitBreaker, HealthProbe, ConvergenceGuard
- **CC3 (Processing Integrity)**: OutputValidator, SchemaValidator, ReasoningEngine
- **CC4 (Confidentiality)**: DelegationTokenManager, AuditLog
- **CC5 (Privacy)**: AuditLog, ComplianceMapper

### EU AI Act (High-Risk Systems)
- **Article 9 (Risk Management)**: KillSwitch, CircuitBreaker, STRIDEMapper
- **Article 10 (Data Governance)**: AuditLog, SchemaValidator
- **Article 11 (Technical Documentation)**: EvolutionLineage, ComplianceMapper
- **Article 12 (Record Keeping)**: AuditLog, LamportClock
- **Article 13 (Transparency)**: OutputValidator, ReasoningEngine
- **Article 14 (Human Oversight)**: KillSwitch, HealthProbe, GovernanceLifecycle
- **Article 15 (Accuracy)**: OutputValidator, RewardMonitor, ReasoningEngine

## Installation

```bash
pip install hummbl-governance
```

Or with uv (10-100x faster):

```bash
uv pip install hummbl-governance
```

## Testing

```bash
python -m pytest tests/ -v --cov=hummbl_governance --cov-fail-under=80
```
